title: Fedimint
note: Open-source federated e-cash project used as the primary decentralized checking and community custody alternative.

title: Fedimint Getting Started
note: Documentation source explaining Fedimint as a modular open-source protocol for community custody, privacy, and Bitcoin transactions.

title: Apache Fineract
note: Open-source core banking project used as a commercial banking and cooperative finance infrastructure alternative.

title: Open Bank Project
note: Open banking API platform source used as an enabler for portable account visibility, payment APIs, and cooperative treasury concepts.

title: BTCPay Server
note: Self-hosted open-source Bitcoin payment processor used as a merchant payment and commercial receivables alternative.
